name: broker-reasks-for-clarification
anchor: Broker re-asks Vienna for clarification (multi-turn re-engagement)
rationale: After Vienna's prelim review, broker replies with a clarifying question (e.g., 'what's needed for AML/PEP confirmation?' or 'what rate-spread are we looking at?'). Tests Vienna's response to clarification-questions vs corrections vs new-info — multi-turn conversational re-engagement.
notes: Two-event sequence: intake + broker clarification question.
